# signoz_route_policy (Data Source)

Reads a single SigNoz route policy by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "signoz_route_policy" "by_id" {
  id = signoz_route_policy.warnings.id
}

output "route_policy_kind" {
  value = data.signoz_route_policy.by_id.kind
}

output "route_policy_created_at" {
  value = data.signoz_route_policy.by_id.created_at
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the route policy to look up.

### Read-Only

- `channels` (List of String) Notification channels this policy routes to.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `created_by` (String) User who created the policy.
- `description` (String) Description of the policy.
- `expression` (String) SigNoz expression evaluated against alert labels.
- `kind` (String) Policy kind: `rule` or `policy`.
- `name` (String) Name of the route policy.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags applied to the policy.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.
- `updated_by` (String) User who last updated the policy.
